## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] Full diff reviewed against `AGENTS.md`, ThoughtSnap standards, and product specification
- [ ] Linked issue and all acceptance criteria verified
- [ ] CI and required local checks are green
- [ ] Architecture and dependency boundaries are consistent
- [ ] Authentication, authorisation, and tenant isolation reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Payment, file, and project-state integrity reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Error, empty, loading, and recovery states reviewed
- [ ] Accessibility and responsive behaviour reviewed for UI changes
- [ ] Tests are meaningful and include regression protection
- [ ] `docs/LEARNINGS.md` was consulted and updated when needed
- [ ] No secrets, fake integrations, dead controls, or production activation
- [ ] No unresolved critical/high findings
- [ ] No unresolved valid medium findings without documented acceptance
- [ ] Final review applies to the current PR head SHA

## Merge decision

- Reviewer Agent: `APPROVE` / `REQUEST_CHANGES`
- Final reviewed head SHA:
- Merge method: squash
